title: cordia ramanujamii
intro: Cordia ramanujamii, also known as the Ramanujam's Cordia, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain compounds like flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, offering anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Cordia ramanujamii is used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
